sentences.arabic: يَتَمَيَّزُ الْمُؤْمِنُ الْقَوِيُّ بِقُدْرَتِهِ عَلَى ضَبْطِ نَفْسِهِ عِنْدَ الْغَضَبِ، وَهَذَا مَا عَلَّمَنَا إِيَّاهُ النَّبِيُّ ﷺ بِقَوْلِهِ: «لَيْسَ الشَّدِيدُ بِالصُّرَعَةِ، إِنَّمَا الشَّدِيدُ الَّذِي يَمْلِكُ نَفْسَهُ عِنْدَ الْغَضَبِ» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ الْأَدَبِ، حَدِيثُ رَقْمِ ٦١١٤].
sentences.translation: Snažan vjernik se odlikuje sposobnošću samokontrole prilikom srdžbe, a tome nas je podučio Poslanik, s.a.v.s., rekavši: 'Nije snažan onaj ko drugog obori, već je snažan onaj ko vlada sobom u srdžbi' [Bilježi Buhari u Knjizi o adabu, hadis br. 6114].
sentences.translationEn: A strong believer is characterized by his ability to control himself when angry, and this is what the Prophet (PBUH) taught us by saying: 'The strong person is not the good wrestler; rather, the strong person is the one who controls himself when he is angry' [Narrated by al-Bukhari in the Book of Manners, Hadith No. 6114].

sentences.arabic: فَالْقُوَّةُ الْحَقِيقِيَّةُ لَيْسَتْ فِي التَّغَلُّبِ عَلَى الْآخَرِينَ جَسَدِيًّا، بَلْ فِي الِانْتِصَارِ عَلَى نَزَغَاتِ الشَّيْطَانِ فِي لَحَظَاتِ الِانْفِعَالِ.
sentences.translation: Prava snaga nije u fizičkoj nadmoći nad drugima, već u pobjedi nad šejtanskim nagovaranjima u trenucima afekta.
sentences.translationEn: True strength is not in physically overcoming others, but in triumphing over the whispers of Satan in moments of emotion.

sentences.arabic: وَقَدْ أَوْصَى الشَّيْخُ الْأَلْبَانِيُّ بِاتِّبَاعِ الْهَدْيِ النَّبَوِيِّ عِنْدَ الْغَضَبِ مِثْلِ الِاسْتِعَاذَةِ بِاللهِ وَتَغْيِيرِ الْهَيْئَةِ أَوْ الْوُضُوءِ.
sentences.translation: Šejh Albani je preporučivao slijeđenje proročanske upute prilikom srdžbe, kao što je traženje zaštite kod Allaha, promjena položaja tijela ili uzimanje abdesta.
sentences.translationEn: Sheikh al-Albani recommended following the Prophetic guidance when angry, such as seeking refuge with Allah, changing one's posture, or performing wudu.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ كَظْمَ الْغَيْظِ مِنَ الصِّفَاتِ الَّتِي مَدَحَهَا اللهُ فِي كِتَابِهِ وَأَثْنَى عَلَى أَهْلِهَا بِالْإِحْسَانِ.
sentences.translation: Suzbijanje gnjeva je jedna od osobina koje je Allah pohvalio u Svojoj Knjizi i obećao dobročinstvo onima koji je posjeduju.
sentences.translationEn: Restraining anger is one of the qualities that Allah praised in His Book and commended its people for their excellence.

sentences.arabic: وَمَنْ تَرَكَ الْغَضَبَ لِلهِ، عَوَّضَهُ اللهُ حَلَاوَةً فِي قَلْبِهِ وَرَاحَةً فِي نَفْسِهِ.
sentences.translation: Ko ostavi srdžbu radi Allaha, Allah će mu to nadoknaditi slašću u srcu i duševnim mirom.
sentences.translationEn: Whoever gives up anger for the sake of Allah, Allah will compensate him with sweetness in his heart and peace in his soul.

sentences.arabic: فَالْمُؤْمِنُ يَتَحَلَّى بِالْحِلْمِ وَالصَّبْرِ لِيَحْمِيَ نَفْسَهُ مِنْ عَوَاقِبِ الْقَوْلِ الْفَاحِشِ وَالظُّلْمِ.
sentences.translation: Vjernik se kiti blagošću i strpljenjem kako bi se zaštitio od posljedica ružnog govora i nepravde.
sentences.translationEn: Thus, the believer adorns himself with forbearance and patience to protect himself from the consequences of foul speech and injustice.
